name: ServiceNow GRC
description: ServiceNow GRC / IRM — policies, controls and documents from the Now Platform. Imports GRC policy + document records into the XORCISM controlled-document register (XCOMPLIANCE.DOCUMENT) via the Table API. Offline: a JSON export. Live: set SERVICENOW_INSTANCE (e.g. acme = acme.service-now.com) + SERVICENOW_USER + SERVICENOW_PASSWORD (Basic auth). Tool: https://www.servicenow.com.

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: Offline JSON export of ServiceNow GRC records.

parameters.name: base
parameters.help: Instance base URL (https://<inst>.service-now.com). Overrides SERVICENOW_INSTANCE. Live needs SERVICENOW_USER + SERVICENOW_PASSWORD.

parameters.name: tables
parameters.help: Comma-separated GRC tables to pull (default sn_grc_policy,sn_grc_document).
